title: ADULT SUBSTANCE USE DISORDER TREATMENT - 211info
text: LIFEWORKS NW KING ADULT SUBSTANCE USE DISORDER TREATMENT Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides outpatient and intensive outpatient services for adults dealing with alcohol and drug problems. Also provides a DUII Adult Addictions outpatient program for adults required to receive treatment as part of a DUII sentence. Additional programs include an outpatient and intensive services program that focuses on the needs of women in the recovery process and Project for Community Recovery, which provides culturally specific services for African Americans. 3716 NE Martin Luther King Jr Boulevard Portland, OR 97212 Eligibility: Age 18 and older. Women's program serves female-identifying adults age 18 and older. Project for Community Recovery serves African Americans age 18 and older. Hours: Monday-Thursday 8am-6pm, Friday 8am-5pm Email (503) 645-9010 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Intake (503) 645-9010 Intake (888) 645-1666 Toll-free Main phone (503) 645-9010 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call FEES: We accept OHP, Medicaid or Medicare. If you need coverage, we can help you get enrolled. Some services are available on a sliding fee scale. We do not turn people away for lack of ability to pay. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
